name: NavBar
description: Responsive navigation bar with brand, links, optional CTA, and mobile drawer. Sticky by default.

brand.description: Brand name or site title displayed on the left

links.description: Array of navigation links, each with: label (string, required), href (string, required)

ctaLabel.description: Label for the call-to-action button in the navbar

ctaHref.description: URL or anchor for the CTA button

sticky.description: Whether the navbar sticks to the top on scroll (default: true)

name: HeroSection
description: Full-width hero section with kicker badge, title, subtitle, dual CTAs, and optional image layout.

kicker.description: Badge text shown above the title (e.g., 'New Release')

ctaLabel.description: Text for the primary call-to-action button

ctaHref.description: URL or anchor the primary CTA button links to

secondaryCtaLabel.description: Text for the secondary (outline) CTA button

secondaryCtaHref.description: URL or anchor the secondary CTA button links to

image.description: URL of an image to display beside the text in a two-column layout

align.description: Content alignment: 'center' (default) or 'start' for left-aligned with image

id.description: HTML id attribute for anchor navigation

name: FeaturesSection
description: Responsive feature grid with configurable columns (2-4), optional icons, titles, and descriptions.

subtitle.description: Optional supporting text below the title

features.description: Array of feature items, each with: title (string, required), description (string, required), icon (string, optional)

columns.description: Number of grid columns on desktop (default: 3)

id.description: HTML id attribute for anchor navigation

name: CarouselSection
description: Image carousel with title overlays and optional descriptions on each slide.

title.description: Optional section heading above the carousel

slides.description: Array of slides, each with: title (string, required), description (string, optional), image (string URL, required)

name: StatsSection
description: Horizontal stats display (vertical on mobile) showing key metrics with labels, values, and optional descriptions.

title.description: Optional section heading above the stats

stats.description: Array of stats, each with: label (string, required), value (string, required), description (string, optional)

id.description: HTML id attribute for anchor navigation

name: CTASection
description: Full-width CTA banner with primary or neutral variant, title, subtitle, and dual action buttons.

ctaLabel.description: Text for the primary action button

ctaHref.description: URL or anchor for the primary action

secondaryCtaLabel.description: Text for the ghost secondary action button

secondaryCtaHref.description: URL or anchor for the secondary action

variant.description: Color variant: 'primary' (default) uses bg-primary, 'neutral' uses bg-neutral

id.description: HTML id attribute for anchor navigation

name: ContactSection
description: Contact form section with configurable field labels, submit text, and form action URL.

subtitle.description: Optional supporting text below the title

nameLabel.description: Label for the name input field (default: 'Name')

emailLabel.description: Label for the email input field (default: 'Email')

id.description: HTML id attribute for anchor navigation
